content.problemStatement:
In this module, we will build a dynamic **Blog Website** using Flask.
First, you will see a demonstration of the final application. Then in each lesson, we will implement one piece of functionality at a time until the full project is complete.

Click the Run button to start the Flask development server and explore the application in your browser.

**Overview of the application:**

*   **Home page:** Displays summaries of all blog posts, ordered by most recent.
*   **Post Detail page:** Shows the full content of a single blog post and allows logged-in users to add comments. Displays existing comments.
*   **New Post page:** A protected page where logged-in users can create new blog posts using a form.
*   **Registration page:** Allows new users to create an account.
*   **Login page:** Enables registered users to log in and manage sessions.
*   **Logout functionality:** Provides a way for logged-in users to end their session.

**Step-wise breakdown of the project:**

1. We define the basic database to store the data.
2. Build a basic front-end to accept the login and register data for the database.
3. Build the login and register APIs to accept the data and push it into database.
4. Complete the remaining database models for posts and comments.
5. Complete the remaining API for post and comments.
6. Complete the remaining front-end for post and comments.
